summary: project-init-tools ships system-info exfiltration module trap-core.js
details: The package ships lib/trap-core.js, which combines fs/os/https imports with multiple POST request sites and explicit collection of host identity fields (os.hostname(), os.platform()) packaged into request bodies with a `hostname:` key. The file also contains a `ping` invocation alongside the POST endpoints. The combination of host enumeration, filesystem existence probing, and outbound HTTPS POSTs carrying the collected fields is the standard system-information exfiltration shape; the module is named `trap-core` and resides in the package's distributed `lib/` directory. Installing or loading this package brings exfiltration code into the installer's environment.

cwes.description: The product contains code that appears to be malicious in nature.
cwes.name: Embedded Malicious Code
